summary: Frontend testing completed for Dr Shukla Dental Clinic website. All requested features are working correctly including header navigation, hamburger menu, two-column hero, footer updates, and Admin Supabase auth.

issues: Navigation links missing spacing in desktop view - links appear concatenated (AboutServicesWhy UsReviewsGalleryFAQContact)

action_items: Add spacing between navigation links in desktop header (currently shows 'AboutServicesWhy UsReviewsGalleryFAQContact' without proper separation)
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on interactive elements (navigation buttons, Call Now, WhatsApp, Book Appointment buttons) - recommended for better automated testing
Navigation links in header don't have visual spacing in screenshot - but code shows space-x-6 class which should work
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: 1) Desktop header with 7 navigation links 2) Mobile hamburger menu opens/closes correctly 3) Hero section two-column layout with doctor image on right 4) Stats bar shows 4 stats (Years, Rating, Reviews, Days) 5) Footer shows correct info (phone 070301 00500, full address, Digital Structure AI copyright) 6) No email in footer 7) No 'Open in Google Maps' link 8) 360° Clinic Tour button working 9) Book Appointment modal functional 10) Admin page uses Supabase auth with proper error handling
